name: io.github.brave/brave-search-mcp-server
description: Brave Search MCP Server: web results, images, videos, rich results, AI summaries, and more.

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Default/fallback API key for the Brave Search API (used when no subscription-specific key is set)

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Search plan — covers web, news, images, videos, local POIs, llm-context endpoints

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_AI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Free AI plan — covers the summarizer endpoint (free tier)

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_PRO_AI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Pro AI plan — covers the summarizer endpoint (deprecated Pro AI subscription)

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_ANSWERS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Answers plan — covers chat completions and AI answers

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_AUTOSUGGEST_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Autosuggest plan — covers the /suggest/search endpoint

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_SPELLCHECK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Spellcheck plan — covers the /spellcheck/search endpoint

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Brave Search API base URL (e.g. to use a local caching proxy). Defaults to https://api.search.brave.com
